name: Rice Soup Florentine
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook brown rice with a pinch of salt in 1-1/2 cups of boiling water for 10 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté leeks, scallions, garlic, bouillon, remaining salt, and pepper in oil until vegetables are soft, about 10 minutes.
3. Add spinach, cooked rice (and any water not absorbed by the rice), and remaining 3 cups of water. Heat through and serve hot.
